# didSelectPost()

**Instance Method**

Sent to the compose view after the post animation finishes.

## Declaration

```swift
func didSelectPost()
```

## Discussion

By default, this method calls the completeRequestReturningItems: method of the associated [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIViewController/extensionContext] property, passing `nil` in the `items` array and a `nil` expiration handler. You must override `didSelectPost` to perform the post of [doc://com.apple.social/documentation/Social/SLComposeServiceViewController/contentText] and any attachments. In your implementation of this method, you can call `super` to take advantage of the default completion handler; if you don’t call `super`, you must call the completion method of the extension context.

## Responding to Lifecycle Events

- **presentationAnimationDidFinish()**: Tells the compose view controller that the presentation animation is finished.
- **didSelectCancel()**: Sent to the compose view after the cancel animation finishes.
